workout_name: Emigration Canyon Sweet Spot and Over-Unders
reasoning: The main limiter for Koren is lactate clearance, indicated by a 9.3% power drop from 5-minute to 20-minute efforts. By incorporating a combination of extended sweet spot and over-under intervals, this workout will specifically target improving aerobic base and fatigue resistance. This is crucial preparation for maintaining 220-235W on the key climb of the Alpine Loop. The last ride showed a lower intensity, paving the way for a focused, productive session today.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 10-minute intervals: 5 mins at 201-218W, then 5 mins at 242-256W, with 3 mins easy spinning in between.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
